title: Test Strategy, Contracts, Properties, and Mutation · Retrieval Circuit
summary: Design a layered test suite around risks rather than file counts. Learners retrieve rules and procedures before seeing feedback. Planned artifact: Extend the evidence record for a risk-to-test coverage matrix after a delayed changed case. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Assign unit, integration, contract, browser, system, and acceptance tests to distinct risks.
Test public behavior, invariants, boundaries, and failure recovery.
Use generated cases for algebraic properties, parser boundaries, and state invariants.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.config:
# Risk-profiled repository gate portfolio
# Each gate needs purpose, command, failure fixture, owner, and suppression policy.

steps.title: Retrieve the complete evidence cycle
steps.instruction: Order the Test Layers evidence cycle for this review task before implementing it.
steps.why: Correct order keeps Test Layers assumptions visible before execution and verifies its result against a boundary case afterward.

content.text: Use a changed review case for gates tests that tests this competency: Assign unit, integration, contract, browser, system, and acceptance tests to distinct risks.. Preserve inputs, constraints, an observable trace, and a boundary result.

content.title: Ordering constraint
content.text: Order work so Test Layers has a declared contract before execution and a boundary or counterexample after it.

lines.label: assumption
lines.text: Use a changed review case for gates tests that tests this competency: Detect, quarantine briefly, diagnose, and remove nondeterminism with ownership.. Preserve inputs, constraints, an observable trace, and a boundary result.

lines.label: risk
lines.text: Retrying a flaky test converts it into a reliable gate.

lines.label: evidence
lines.text: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Detect, quarantine briefly, diagnose, and remove nondeterminism with ownership. Artifact under review: a risk-to-test coverage matrix.

options.text: The record names the assumption, applies Flaky Tests, and reports a changed-case check tied to the stakeholder decision.

The Flaky Tests record says a risk-to-test coverage matrix looks right but supplies no governing condition, observation, changed case, or counterexample. This does not resolve separate evidence from confidence.

For separate evidence from confidence, apply Flaky Tests without its stated preconditions, omit the a risk-to-test coverage matrix trace and counterexample, and treat one plausible output as complete proof. This does not satisfy Flaky Tests for a risk-to-test coverage matrix.

content.title: Evidence defense
content.text: Use the case, one assumption, one observable result, and one limitation. Do not copy the competency statement: Detect, quarantine briefly, diagnose, and remove nondeterminism with ownership.
